bg.$description: — THE canonical synthwave purple-black; not pure black (#000000, too flat), not dark purple (#1A0033, too saturated); this specific hex sits at the exact point where purple-black reads as night sky with atmosphere rather than void or grape

primary.$description: hot pink  — pure magenta-shifted pink; the color of neon bar signs on wet asphalt; not coral (too warm), not rose (too soft), not magenta (#FF00FF, too pure/RGB-synthetic); #FF00A0 has the slight warm-shift that makes it feel like neon gas rather than screen pixel

accent.$description: — electric cyan; near-pure cyan shifted slightly warm to prevent pure RGB feeling; pairs with hot pink on the complementary axis; reads as CRT phosphor glow

base.$description: Base grid unit (all spacing is a multiple of this).
